hooks.command: f=$(sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -n1); case "$f" in *.md) :;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in */.claude/*|*/.github/*|*/.obsidian/*|*/README.md|*/AGENTS.md|*/CLAUDE.md) exit 0;; esac; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; if grep -q '\[\[' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "doc-lint advisory: $f has an Obsidian wikilink ([[...]]) — use a relative .md link instead."; fi; if [ "$(head -n1 "$f" 2>/dev/null)" != "---" ]; then echo "doc-lint advisory: $f is missing YAML frontmatter (title, category, last_updated)."; fi; exit 0
